title: Vertu wants executives to pay $6,880 for an AI agent — here's how it actually performs | TechCrunch
summary: At the heart of the Alphafold is Hermes Agent, a pre-installed AI agent built on top of the open-source Hermes project , which the company says can analyze files, automate tasks across apps, remember conversations, and hand off requests to a human…
